output.level_rationale: Title 'Senior Revenue Operations & Strategy Manager' suggests L5 IC or L4 lead scope, but without JD text, company stage, reporting line, or team context, confidence is very low. Assume L5 baseline (6+ years, ownership across strategy and execution), but early-stage startup context could make this L4-equivalent.
